chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D – 2049 of 2017. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.01.2018. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTIONS. FOR KATCHA PESHI. ----- None present for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari, A.P.G. ------- None present for the petitioner. No intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 11.01.2018. It is stated by learned A.A.G. that the alleged detenue is involved in Crime No.111 of 2017 of Police Station ‘A’ Section Mahar and has been confined in Sub- Jail Mahar. Since the alleged detenue Muhammad Nawaz is in Jail, therefore, this petition has become infructuous which is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE A.
